title: General Info: inst-comp-eeg
description: This EEG dataset comprises neuroimaging recordings from participants performing an instruction-following task and a complementary 1-back localizer task. The instruction-following task required participants to integrate or selectively attend to visual stimuli based on sequentially presented instructions specifying attention allocation, stimulus category, relevant features (color or shape), and motor response mappings. The dataset includes 16 blocks of the main task (512 trials total) and 8 blocks of the localizer task (320 trials), with fully counterbalanced trial conditions and catch trials to ensure sustained attention.
methods_description: EEG data were recorded during two tasks in a single session. The main instruction-following task presented four sequential instruction screens (200 ms display, 800 ms inter-screen interval) followed by target images (200 ms) requiring binary responses. The localizer task was a 1-back paradigm with single images per trial. Participants responded using key presses ('A' or 'L'). Main task blocks (n=16, 32 trials each) and localizer blocks (n=8, 40 trials each) were counterbalanced across the session.
